journeys.name: Multi Role Evidence Review And Compliance Handoff
journeys.overclaimRisk: Viewer may assume AI extraction is autonomous or final.
journeys.caveat: Low-confidence extraction is a demo-state route; human review is the claim, not autonomous AI accuracy.
journeys.captionShort: Role changes are explicit across upload, review, approval, compliance and principal decision visibility.
journeys.captionLong: This multi-role journey shows exactly when responsibility moves from Family CFO to Analyst to Advisor to Compliance Officer to Principal.
presenterNotes: Use this to answer AI-safety questions, not as an ML-performance proof.
journeys.endState: Family CFO upload intent, analyst evidence review, advisor approval, compliance block and principal decision visibility are shown as separate role-owned steps.

journeys.name: Export Without Approval Blocked
journeys.overclaimRisk: Viewer may assume download is always available.
journeys.caveat: Export download requires approval/redaction and remains metadata-only demo proof.
journeys.captionShort: Export is blocked until controls are satisfied.
journeys.captionLong: Export proof includes approval, redaction and manifest constraints before sharing.
journeys.endState: Export remains blocked until approval controls pass.
preconditions: Demo session mode is active
No real customer data is used

complianceRules: Advisor approval alone is not enough

riskNotes: Viewer may assume download is always available.
Export download requires approval/redaction and remains metadata-only demo proof.

steps.expectedStateChange: Export cannot proceed if blocked policy remains
steps.title: Export Preview: Inspect approval modal state
steps.caption: The export is reviewed before download or sharing. Scope and redaction keep sensitive client data from being shared too broadly.

journeys.name: Export Share Link Expires Or Is Revoked
journeys.overclaimRisk: Viewer may assume full secure-link lifecycle implementation.
journeys.caveat: Share expiry/revoke is a route/static proof candidate until a dedicated export-share handler exists.
journeys.captionLong: Privacy-safe export delivery needs a visible expiry or revoke path before external sharing is customer-sendable.
presenterNotes: Use as a roadmap-proof clip, not as completed workflow proof.
journeys.endState: Share expiry/revoke is visible as a proof candidate.

journeys.name: Access Request Denied Or Revoked
journeys.overclaimRisk: Viewer may assume deny/revoke is fully productized.
journeys.caveat: Access negative path is a proof candidate; keep as QA-first unless implemented end-to-end.
journeys.captionShort: Access can be denied or revoked.
journeys.captionLong: Governance proof must include removing access, not only granting it.
presenterNotes: Promote later if governance diligence requires visual proof.
journeys.endState: Access denial/revoke path is treated as QA-first proof.
preconditions: Demo session mode is active
